projectDescription: A self-hosted MCP server that gives Claude authenticated access to your machines, APIs, and persistent memory via SSH, Tailscale, and configurable HTTP proxying.
keyFeatures: SSH execution on any Tailscale-enrolled device via ssh_exec
Authenticated HTTP proxy with per-domain token injection via fetch_external
Persistent AI memory backed by GitHub Gists via gist_kb
Tailscale device discovery and status via tailscale_status
Headless browser automation via CDP with the browser tool
GitHub PR and commit search via github_search
SSH command blocklist and directory allowlist for safety boundaries
Full audit log of every tool call with sensitive key stripping
Dry-run mode for ssh_exec to test without side effects
Stateless MCP transport — new handler per request, no session state
publicApiSurface: ssh_exec — Run shell commands on Tailscale devices
tailscale_status — List all Tailscale devices with status and IPs
fetch_external — Proxy HTTP requests with injected auth per domain
github_search — Search GitHub PRs and commits
gist_kb — Read/write persistent knowledge base backed by GitHub Gists
browser — Control headless browser via CDP
